q2b_overlap.interpretation: Q2b variants are in HBB promoter (upstream of bait), not captured as interaction endpoints. PCHi-C confirms the HBB-LCR enhancer-promoter loop exists in erythroblasts (CHiCAGO up to 10.5) but does not directly validate Q2b disruption.

lcr_interactions.interpretation: Strong erythroblast-specific HBB-LCR contacts confirmed (CHiCAGO>5), consistent with ARCHCODE model predicting LCR-proximal enhancer-promoter loops.

tissue_specificity.interpretation: Erythroblast CHiCAGO scores consistently highest across HBB interactions, confirming tissue-specific chromatin architecture.
